title: Chingia sakayensis

Chingia sakayensis is an evergreen shrub or small tree that is commonly found in tropical forests. The classification of Chingia sakayensis is within the kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Celastrales.
